rationale: Level-3 for Medicine has to balance two pulls: the boarded-fellowship granularity (cardiology splits into electrophysiology, interventional, heart-failure, structural, preventive, congenital) and the picker-card economy. I went deep where the journal ecosystem is rich (cardiology, oncology, surgery, infectious disease) and stayed shallow where it isn't (geriatrics, emergency medicine). Each leaf is something a fellowship-trained clinician would identify with on their academic profile.

subfields.name: Interventional Cardiology
subfields.tagline: PCI, structural heart, TAVR, congenital intervention.

subfields.name: Medical Oncology — Solid Tumors
subfields.tagline: Lung, breast, GI, GU solid-tumor systemic therapy.

subfields.name: Immuno-Oncology (Clinical)
subfields.tagline: Checkpoint inhibitors, adoptive cell therapy, vaccines clinical.

subfields.name: Neurodegenerative Disorders
subfields.tagline: Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, ALS, FTD — anti-amyloid, GLP-1.

subfields.name: Epilepsy & Clinical Neurophysiology
subfields.tagline: Anti-seizure meds, surgery, EEG, status epilepticus.

subfields.name: Addiction Medicine
subfields.tagline: Opioids, alcohol, MAT, harm reduction clinical.

subfields.name: Inflammatory Skin Disease
subfields.tagline: Psoriasis, AD, hidradenitis — biologics, JAK inhibitors.

subfields.name: Inflammatory Bowel Disease
subfields.tagline: Crohn's, UC — biologics, small molecules, surgery indications.

subfields.name: Hepatology & Liver Disease
subfields.tagline: MAFLD/MASH, viral hepatitis, transplant, HCC clinical.

subfields.name: Diabetes & Metabolic Disease (Clinical)
subfields.tagline: T1/T2 trials, GLP-1, AID systems, MASH overlap.

subfields.name: Obesity Medicine
subfields.tagline: Pharmacotherapy, bariatric overlap, weight regain biology.

subfields.name: Rheumatoid & Inflammatory Arthritis
subfields.tagline: RA, PsA, axSpA — JAKi, IL-17, IL-23.

subfields.name: Antimicrobial Stewardship & AMR (Clinical)
subfields.tagline: Hospital AMR, novel antibiotics trials, stewardship outcomes.

subfields.name: HIV Clinical Care
subfields.tagline: ART, prevention, comorbidities, HIV cure trials.

subfields.name: General Surgery & Trauma
subfields.tagline: Acute care, hernia, biliary, emergency general surgery.

subfields.name: Surgical Oncology
subfields.tagline: HPB, sarcoma, peritoneal, complex oncologic resection.

uncovered_concerns: Many surgical subspecialties (ENT, ophthalmology, plastic, neurosurgery) live conceptually under Surgery L2 but their leaf-level papers will fold here under General Surgery & Trauma or Surgical Oncology — splitting all of them would blow the 38-leaf budget for medicine.
Geriatrics & Palliative Care L2 has no L3 leaves here — its papers are small in volume and fold into the relevant organ-system leaf with a 'geriatric' qualifier handled at classifier-time.
